overall.description: A cinematic third-person game sequence showing a robed character walking through a snowy mountain canyon at dusk. The character traverses a winding path between rocky cliffs, passing under a stone archway and continuing through a lantern-lit passage as the sky displays vibrant purple and pink sunset hues.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain canyon path between rock walls

agents.ego_description: character in dark red robe walking steadily along the snowy path, holding a light source in front

entered.detail: tall dark rock formation with snow patches lining the left side of the path
large boulder and rock wall formation on the right side of the canyon
cluster of tall evergreen trees visible in the distance against the colorful sky
snowy path with patches of exposed stone and grass tufts along the edges

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow snowy canyon flanked by dark rock walls. The path winds toward distant pine trees silhouetted against a vibrant purple and pink dusk sky. Sparse grass tufts emerge from the snow along the canyon floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone archway passage through the canyon wall

events.description: character passes under a large stone arch bridge with ice formations visible on the right

agents.ego_description: character continues walking forward, approaching and passing beneath the stone archway while holding the light source aloft

entered.detail: large natural stone archway forming a tunnel-like passage through the rock wall
glistening ice waterfall or frozen formation on the right side of the arch
lit lantern on a stone post illuminating the path

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes under a massive stone archway that bridges the canyon. A glowing ice formation becomes visible on the right as the character moves through the semi-covered passage. Lit lanterns begin to appear along the path, adding warm light to the cool twilight atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding lantern-lit canyon trail with snow-covered trees

events.description: path opens slightly allowing more of the purple dusk sky to become visible between the trees

agents.ego_description: character continues along the winding snowy path, navigating gentle curves while passing multiple lit lanterns

entered.detail: snow-laden evergreen trees lining both sides of the path further down the canyon
dark stone structure or ruins visible on the right horizon against the sky

segments.scene_description: The character follows a winding path deeper into the canyon, passing regularly spaced lanterns that cast warm glow on the snow. The environment gradually opens to reveal more snow-covered trees and a glimpse of distant ruins or structures on the horizon. The purple and pink twilight sky remains visible through the canyon opening above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow snowy canyon that gradually opens into a lantern-lit mountain pass under a vibrant twilight sky. It begins with the character walking between dark rock walls and sparse grass tufts, winding toward distant pine trees silhouetted against purple and pink hues. As the character advances, the scene shifts beneath a massive stone archway where a glowing ice formation appears and the first warm lanterns begin to illuminate the cool atmosphere. The camera then follows the winding path deeper into the canyon, passing a series of regularly spaced lanterns that cast a golden glow across the snow. Finally, the environment expands to reveal more snow-covered trees and the faint silhouette of distant ruins on the horizon beneath the colorful dusk sky.
